contentBlocks.original:
नमो ब्रह्मण्य देवाय गोब्राह्मण हिताय च ।
जगत् हिताय कृष्णाय गोविंदाय नमो नमः ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
namo brahmaṇya devāya gobrāhmaṇa hitāya ca .
jagat hitāya kṛṣṇāya goviṃdāya namo namaḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation: Salutation to the brahma-swarupa for the welfare of the devas, cows and brahmins. Salutation again and again to the benefactor of the universe, Krishna and Govinda.
contentBlocks.meanings: नमः (namaḥ) – salutation; ब्रह्मण्य (brahmaṇya) – to the brahma-swarupa; देवाय (devāya) – to the god; गौब्राह्मणहिताय (gobrāhmaṇahitāya) – for welfare of cows and brahmins (go:cows | brāhmaṇa:brahmins | hitāya:for welfare); च (ca) – and; जगत् (jagat) – universe; हिताय (hitāya) – for welfare; कृष्णाय (kṛṣṇāya) – to Krishna; गोविंदाय (govindāya) – to Govinda; नमः (namaḥ) – salutation; नमः (namaḥ) – salutation;
